steps.name: Select 'Test Request Server' company using filter
Select 'Test Request Server' business unit using filter
Set start and end date: 01-05-2025 to 07-05-2025
Select currency USD from dropdown menu
Select Payment method 'VISA' from dropdown menu
Verify: merchant ID is sent to the server
